toolPurpose: Retrieve the authenticated user's home timeline with posts from followed accounts, supporting pagination via cursor and optional limit configuration.

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default: 30, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to continue fetching posts

toolPurpose: Retrieve all posts created by a specific user (author) with optional filtering for replies and reposts.

actor.description: User handle (e.g., 'john.bsky.social') or DID (Decentralized Identifier) of the author

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default: 30, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for continued retrieval

filter.description: Filter type: 'posts_only' (exclude replies and reposts), 'posts_with_replies', or 'all' (default)

toolPurpose: Create a new post on Bluesky with text content and optional rich facets (mentions, hashtags, links). REQUIRES explicit Steward confirmation before execution.

facets.description: Optional array of rich facets (mentions, hashtags, links) to embed in the post

index.description: Character index range in the text

features.description: Array of feature objects (mention, tag, link, etc.)

reply_to.description: Optional URI of parent post if this is a reply

toolPurpose: Search for posts across Bluesky using keyword queries with optional date range and sorting options.

q.description: Search query (keywords, hashtags, or natural language text)

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to filter posts created after this date

until.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to filter posts created before this date

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 25, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed profile information for a specific Bluesky user including handle, display name, description, followers count, and posts count.

actor.description: User handle (e.g., 'john.bsky.social') or DID (Decentralized Identifier) to retrieve profile for

toolPurpose: Retrieve the authenticated user's notifications including likes, reposts, replies, follows, and mentions with pagination support.

limit.description: Maximum number of notifications to return (default: 30, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for continued retrieval

seen.description: Filter by notification read status (true=seen only, false=unseen only, omit for all)
